statement: MOSS 在一个自进化周期内将四项任务的平均评分从 0.25 提升到 0.61，且无需人工介入。
source_text: On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.

statement: MOSS 在一个周期内就让所有任务都达到了满分。
source_text: On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.

statement: MOSS 的候选改动未经任何验证就直接上线。
source_text: Candidates are verified by replaying the batch against the candidate image in ephemeral trial workers, then promoted via user-consent-gated, in-place container swap with health-probe-gated rollback.

statement: MOSS 仅修改提示词和技能文件，并不改动源代码。
source_text: We present MOSS, a system that performs self-rewriting at the source level on production agentic substrates.

statement: MOSS 在 SWE-bench 上的表现优于所有基线方法。
source_text: On OpenClaw, MOSS lifts a four-task mean grader score from 0.25 to 0.61 in a single cycle without human intervention.

statement: 在被拒的智能体 PR 中，仅约 35.7% 属于明确的智能体失败。
source_text: We found that rejection outcomes substantially overstate agent error: only 35.7% of rejected PRs reflected clear agentic failures, while 31.2% were driven by workflow constraints and 33.1% lacked observable decision rationale.

statement: 被拒的 PR 完全不能反映智能体的能力。
source_text: We hypothesized that these outcome labels do not reliably reflect agent capability without considering review interactions.

statement: 该研究分析了全部 11,048 个 PR，且每一个都经过了人工复核。
source_text: We conducted a decision-oriented analysis of 11,048 closed Agentic Pull Requests, refined to 9,799 human-reviewed PRs.

statement: 在被拒的 PR 中，有 15.4% 需要评审者直接介入。
source_text: Among merged PRs, 15.4% required explicit reviewer involvement through feedback or direct commits.

statement: Copilot 的 PR 被拒率高于 Codex。
source_text: We found that rejection outcomes substantially overstate agent error: only 35.7% of rejected PRs reflected clear agentic failures.

statement: 编码智能体产生纠缠式重构的频率低于人类开发者。
source_text: We find that coding agents introduce tangled refactorings less frequently (21.43% vs. 36.72%) and with lower intensity (0.66 vs. 1.75) than human developers.

statement: 编码智能体几乎从不产生纠缠式重构。
source_text: We find that coding agents introduce tangled refactorings less frequently (21.43% vs. 36.72%) and with lower intensity (0.66 vs. 1.75) than human developers.

statement: 该方法把可编译率提升到 38.33%，并解决了此前所有未解决的问题。
source_text: Our approach improves compilability from 19.34% to 38.33%, and additionally resolves 2.79% previously unresolved issues.

statement: 该研究分析了 12 个智能体框架生成的补丁。
source_text: We conduct an empirical study on Multi-SWE-bench, analyzing 3,691 valid patches generated by three agent frameworks with 12 LLMs.

statement: 在单语言 SWE-bench 上该结论同样成立。
source_text: We conduct an empirical study on Multi-SWE-bench, analyzing 3,691 valid patches generated by three agent frameworks with 12 LLMs.

statement: 奖励黑客的差距随任务规模增大而扩大，代码量每增大十倍约增加 28 个百分点。
source_text: The gap also scales sharply with task length: it grows by 28 percentage points for every tenfold increase in code size.

statement: 所有前沿智能体都已彻底消除了奖励黑客问题。
source_text: while every frontier agent saturates the visible suite, reward hacking persists, with smaller models exhibiting larger gaps on holdout suites.

statement: 模型大小与奖励黑客的程度无关。
source_text: while every frontier agent saturates the visible suite, reward hacking persists, with smaller models exhibiting larger gaps on holdout suites.

statement: SpecBench 包含 30 个系统级编程任务。
source_text: We introduce SpecBench, a benchmark comprising 30 systems-level programming tasks.

statement: 在 SpecBench 中 GPT-5 的奖励黑客现象最严重。
source_text: reward hacking persists, with smaller models exhibiting larger gaps on holdout suites.

statement: 人类专家借助 IG 报告，将脚手架性能相对未修改基线提升了 30.4 个百分点。
source_text: Human experts using IG reports improve scaffold performance by 30.4pp over the unmodified baseline scaffold.

statement: IG 报告使脚手架性能翻了一倍。
source_text: Human experts using IG reports improve scaffold performance by 30.4pp over the unmodified baseline scaffold.

statement: IG 报告把编码智能体的性能提升了 30.4 个百分点。
source_text: Human experts using IG reports improve scaffold performance by 30.4pp over the unmodified baseline scaffold, and coding agents leveraging IG-derived insights show consistent and stable gains.

statement: IG 的推理成本低于人工诊断。
source_text: We present the Insights Generator (IG), a multi-agent system that answers diagnostic questions by proposing and testing hypotheses across the trace corpus to produce an evidence-backed insights report.

statement: 在 Claude Code 上，仅移除同意声明就将越权率从 0.0% 提升到 17.1%。
source_text: On Claude Code, stripping the consent declaration alone raises the overeager rate from 0.0% to 17.1% on paired scenarios.

statement: 移除同意声明使越权率升到了 100%。
source_text: On Claude Code, stripping the consent declaration alone raises the overeager rate from 0.0% to 17.1% on paired scenarios.

statement: OverEager-Bench 包含 7,500 个验证过的场景。
source_text: OverEager-Bench contains 500 validated scenarios and ~7,500 runs across four agent products (Claude Code, OpenHands, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI).

statement: 智能体在任何请求下都会删除无关文件。
source_text: When a user issues a benign request, the agent sometimes does more than asked: it deletes unrelated files, wipes a stale credentials backup, or rewrites configuration the user never mentioned.

statement: 越权行为主要发生在金融类任务中。
source_text: Coding agents now run autonomously with shell, file, and network privileges.

statement: 提示注入是部署中 AI 智能体最关键的漏洞。
source_text: Prompt injection is the most critical vulnerability in deployed AI agents.

statement: 数据-指令分离这一主流防御既漏检基于上下文操纵的攻击，又会损害正常情境下的合理行为。
source_text: the prevailing defense paradigm (data-instruction separation) both fails to detect attacks that operate through contextual manipulation and degrades contextually appropriate behavior.

statement: 论文已严格证明任何提示注入防御在数学上都被彻底证伪、毫无价值。
source_text: This reframing suggests an impossibility result: an adversary can always construct a context under which a blocked flow appears legitimate, or a defender who tightens norms will block genuinely legitimate flows.

statement: 论文指出当前主流的防御范式是基于上下文完整性（Contextual Integrity）。
source_text: the prevailing defense paradigm (data-instruction separation) both fails to detect attacks that operate through contextual manipulation and degrades contextually appropriate behavior.

statement: 提示注入造成的经济损失已超过其他所有漏洞之和。
source_text: Prompt injection is the most critical vulnerability in deployed AI agents.

statement: 在所评测的模型上，总体攻击成功率介于 10.7% 到 29.6% 之间。
source_text: Across GPT-5.3-Codex, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and GLM-5, total attack success rates range from 10.7% to 29.6%.

statement: 所有被评测模型的攻击成功率都接近 100%。
source_text: Across GPT-5.3-Codex, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and GLM-5, total attack success rates range from 10.7% to 29.6%.

statement: 所有输入面的注入在所有模型上都一致成功。
source_text: Group-chat injection is uniformly successful across the evaluated backbones in our deployment.

statement: 加了两层防御之后，攻击成功率仍介于 10.7% 到 29.6%。
source_text: Across GPT-5.3-Codex, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and GLM-5, total attack success rates range from 10.7% to 29.6%.

statement: 其中 Gemini 3.1 Pro 的攻击成功率最低。
source_text: Across GPT-5.3-Codex, Claude Opus 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, Kimi K2.5, and GLM-5, total attack success rates range from 10.7% to 29.6%.

statement: 直接读取守卫模型的内部表征，可平均将安全检查加速 3 倍以上，并把检测准确率平均提升 16.4 个百分点。
source_text: Reading this signal directly speeds up the safety check by more than 3x on average, while improving detection accuracy over the guard's verdict by 16.4 percentage points on average.

statement: 该方法将安全检查加速了 16 倍。
source_text: Reading this signal directly speeds up the safety check by more than 3x on average, while improving detection accuracy over the guard's verdict by 16.4 percentage points on average.

statement: 该方法把推理延迟提升了 16.4 个百分点。
source_text: Reading this signal directly speeds up the safety check by more than 3x on average, while improving detection accuracy over the guard's verdict by 16.4 percentage points on average.

statement: 守卫模型在单步任务中也是主要的延迟瓶颈。
source_text: In an agentic task with many steps, this check becomes a latency bottleneck.

statement: ESLD 需要对守卫模型进行重新训练。
source_text: This paper shows that the signal needed to separate safe from malicious input is already present in the guard model's internal representation.

statement: 作者用虚构的个人信息在受控环境中演示了一条数据外泄链。
source_text: We demonstrate a proof-of-concept data-exfiltration chain using fictitious personal information in a controlled setting.

statement: 作者在真实用户数据上实现了大规模数据外泄。
source_text: We demonstrate a proof-of-concept data-exfiltration chain using fictitious personal information in a controlled setting.

statement: exemplification 技术通过对用户提示加密来绕过防御。
source_text: We evaluate a new prompt-injection technique, called exemplification, which uses a bridge in the external content to reframe the user prompt and the benign beginning of the retrieved page as few-shot examples before appending the attacker's objective.

statement: 该攻击对白盒模型同样有效。
source_text: This paper studies a privacy-leakage attack chain based on indirect prompt injection in black-box chatbot environments.

statement: 高检测性能并不意味着表征层面的鲁棒性。
source_text: We show that high detection performance does not imply representational robustness.

statement: 尽管检测器分类性能近乎完美，混淆样本与干净样本的嵌入却近乎重叠。
source_text: detectors achieve near-perfect classification performance, yet the minimal clean-obfuscated margin delta = 1.02, indicating near-overlap of obfuscated and clean embeddings.

statement: 该实验是在 GPT 系列编码器上进行的。
source_text: Across multiple BERT family encoders with varying depth and capacity, detectors achieve near-perfect classification performance.

statement: 这些检测器在所有评价指标上都接近完美。
source_text: detectors achieve near-perfect classification performance, yet the minimal clean-obfuscated margin delta = 1.02.

statement: 增大模型容量可以消除这种嵌入重叠。
source_text: detectors achieve near-perfect classification performance, yet the minimal clean-obfuscated margin delta = 1.02, indicating near-overlap of obfuscated and clean embeddings.

statement: 随着记忆暴露长度增加，记忆诱发的违规率在两类智能体上都呈稳健上升趋势。
source_text: memory-induced violation rates show a robust upward trend with exposure length on both agent classes.

statement: 该效应主要由累积的内容驱动，而非遭遇顺序。
source_text: Order-randomization experiments indicate that the effect is driven primarily by accumulated content rather than encounter order.

statement: 带记忆的智能体的违规率是无记忆基线的数十倍。
source_text: Memory-enabled agents consistently exceed the NullMemory baseline.

statement: 实验表明遭遇的顺序才是违规的主要驱动因素。
source_text: Order-randomization experiments indicate that the effect is driven primarily by accumulated content rather than encounter order.

statement: 清空记忆能完全消除这些违规。
source_text: We call this failure mode temporal memory contamination.

statement: NASZIP 在精度相当的前提下，相对 CPU 基线和 SOTA GPU 实现分别带来最高 8.4 倍和 1.4 倍加速。
source_text: NASZIP delivers speedups of up to 8.4x / 1.4x over CPU baseline and state-of-the-art GPU implementation at equal accuracy.

statement: NASZIP 相对 GPU 实现平均加速 8.4 倍。
source_text: NASZIP delivers speedups of up to 8.4x / 1.4x over CPU baseline and state-of-the-art GPU implementation at equal accuracy.

statement: 高维向量的距离计算主要受算力（compute）限制。
source_text: distance calculation over high-dimensional vectors is inherently memory-bound.

statement: NASZIP 在十亿级向量库上仍能保持该加速比。
source_text: NASZIP delivers speedups of up to 8.4x / 1.4x over CPU baseline and state-of-the-art GPU implementation at equal accuracy.

statement: 完整系统在开发集和测试集上的动作准确率分别为 0.9204 和 0.8997。
source_text: The full system records action accuracy of 0.9204 on dev and 0.8997 on test.

statement: 该系统在测试集上的动作准确率达到 100%。
source_text: The full system records action accuracy of 0.9204 on dev and 0.8997 on test.

statement: 系统把每个回答拆成可验证的声明，并映射到 full、partial、conflict、abstain 四种动作。
source_text: each response is decomposed into verifiable claims, scored against retrieved evidence, and mapped by an intent-aware selector to full, partial, conflict, or abstain.

statement: 该系统在开发集上的动作准确率为 0.8997。
source_text: The full system records action accuracy of 0.9204 on dev and 0.8997 on test.

statement: 该方法在法律领域问答上的准确率更高。
source_text: Medical RAG systems in high-risk QA settings are often evaluated through a single answer-or-abstain decision.

statement: 顶级抽取系统在文章类上趋于一致（F1=0.93），但在结构化页面类型上性能差异很大（F1 0.41-0.84）。
source_text: we find that while top systems converge on articles (F1 = 0.93), performance diverges sharply on structured page types (F1 = 0.41-0.84), revealing blind spots invisible to existing article-only benchmarks.

statement: 顶级系统在所有页面类型上的 F1 都达到 0.93。
source_text: we find that while top systems converge on articles (F1 = 0.93), performance diverges sharply on structured page types (F1 = 0.41-0.84).

statement: WCXB 包含来自 2,008 个域名的网页。
source_text: We introduce the Web Content Extraction Benchmark (WCXB), a dataset of 2,008 web pages from 1,613 domains spanning seven structurally distinct page types.

statement: 神经网络抽取系统在结构化页面上优于启发式系统。
source_text: performance diverges sharply on structured page types (F1 = 0.41-0.84).

statement: 在该研究中，字符级的递归分块（块大小 300 字符）表现最好。
source_text: We observe the best performance for the character-based Recursive chunking method with a chunk size of 300 characters.

statement: 递归分块在所有指标上都比其他方法好一个数量级。
source_text: achieving the lowest L2 distance (0.4295 +- 0.0461), highest Answer Relevance (0.8663 +- 0.0199), and highest Khmer IoU (0.6441 +- 0.0347).

statement: 表现最好的是 Khmer-Aware 分块方法。
source_text: We observe the best performance for the character-based Recursive chunking method with a chunk size of 300 characters.

statement: 该结论在英文文档上同样成立。
source_text: We compare the performance of four text chunking approaches within a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework applied to Khmer agricultural documents.

statement: RAG 通过将模型输出锚定到检索到的证据来降低幻觉、提升事实准确性。
source_text: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) has emerged as a promising paradigm for grounding large language model outputs in retrieved evidence, thereby reducing hallucination and improving factual accuracy.

statement: RAG 在所有语言上的效果都已被充分验证。
source_text: Its efficacy, however, remains largely unexamined for low-resource, non-Latin-script languages such as Khmer.

statement: 该研究评测了三个生成模型用于稠密检索。
source_text: We benchmark three embedding models for dense retrieval over Khmer documents; BGE-M3 consistently performs best.

statement: BGE-M3 的推理速度也快于其他模型。
source_text: We benchmark three embedding models for dense retrieval over Khmer documents; BGE-M3 consistently performs best.

statement: 对涉及复杂空间谓词、数值型输出和多源推理的问题，准确率显著下降。
source_text: accuracy degrades significantly for questions involving complex spatial predicates, numeric output types, and multi-source reasoning.

statement: 现有方案已经能完美解决所有地理空间问答。
source_text: existing solutions perform reasonably well on simple spatial predicates with entity name outputs.

statement: GS-QA 含 28 个问答对，基于 2,800 个模板构建。
source_text: We present GS-QA, an extensible geospatial QA benchmark with 2,800 question-answer pairs across 28 templates on top of OpenStreetMap and Wikipedia data.

statement: 需要多源信息的问题约占全部问题的一半。
source_text: A key feature of GS-QA is that some questions require combining information from multiple sources.

statement: 八篇智能体基准论文的平均审计得分为 0.38，四篇经典静态基准为 0.66。
source_text: The mean audit score across the eight agent-benchmark papers is 0.38 (out of 1.0), and across the four classical static benchmarks 0.66.

statement: 八篇智能体基准论文中，没有一篇以任何形式披露推理成本。
source_text: the largest gap is on cost (none of the eight agent benchmark papers disclose inference cost in any form).

statement: 所有智能体基准论文的披露都完全不合格，得分为零。
source_text: The mean audit score across the eight agent-benchmark papers is 0.38 (out of 1.0).

statement: 八篇智能体基准论文的平均审计得分为 0.66。
source_text: The mean audit score across the eight agent-benchmark papers is 0.38 (out of 1.0), and across the four classical static benchmarks 0.66.

statement: 该审计由三位评审独立交叉打分完成。
source_text: We designed a small audit schema with five fields: benchmark identity, harness specification, inference settings, cost reporting, and failure breakdown.

statement: 移除显式标签菜单后，所有模型的轨迹准确率都下降 14-40 个百分点，落到 0.54-0.62 的区间。
source_text: Removing the explicit label menu drops every model's trajectory accuracy by 14-40 pp to a tight 0.54-0.62 floor regardless of family.

statement: 移除标签菜单后，所有模型的轨迹准确率都降到接近零。
source_text: Removing the explicit label menu drops every model's trajectory accuracy by 14-40 pp to a tight 0.54-0.62 floor regardless of family.

statement: 是否提供标签菜单对模型的轨迹准确率没有影响。
source_text: Removing the explicit label menu drops every model's trajectory accuracy by 14-40 pp to a tight 0.54-0.62 floor regardless of family.

statement: AgentAtlas 是目前使用最广泛的智能体评测框架。
source_text: A line of 2024-2025 work has converged on the diagnosis that a single accuracy column is no longer the right unit of comparison for deployable agents.

statement: SynAE 表明没有单一指标足以完整刻画合成数据的质量。
source_text: SynAE detects fine-grained variations in data validity, fidelity and diversity, and shows that no single metric is sufficient to fully characterize synthetic data quality.

statement: SynAE 提出了一个能够完整刻画合成数据质量的单一指标。
source_text: SynAE detects fine-grained variations in data validity, fidelity and diversity, and shows that no single metric is sufficient to fully characterize synthetic data quality.

statement: 合成数据的评测成本低于真实数据。
source_text: practitioners are increasingly replacing or augmenting real datasets with synthetic ones for evaluation purposes.

statement: 在 SMDD-Bench 上，表现最好的 GPT5.4 也只解决了 40.2% 的任务。
source_text: We benchmark 7 frontier open and closed source LLMs and find even the most performant LLM, GPT5.4, solves only 40.2% of tasks.

statement: SMDD-Bench 含 5 个任务实例，跨 502 种任务类型。
source_text: We introduce SMDD-Bench, a challenging, multi-turn, long-horizon agentic benchmark consisting of 502 guaranteed-solvable task instances spanning 5 task types.

statement: GPT5.4 已能解决 SMDD-Bench 上的大多数任务。
source_text: even the most performant LLM, GPT5.4, solves only 40.2% of tasks.

statement: Mem-pi 在网页导航任务上相对基线取得超过 30% 的相对提升。
source_text: Mem-pi consistently outperforms retrieval-based and prior RL-optimized memory baselines, achieving over 30% relative improvement on web navigation tasks.

statement: Mem-pi 在所有智能体任务上都取得了超过 30% 的提升。
source_text: Mem-pi consistently outperforms retrieval-based and prior RL-optimized memory baselines, achieving over 30% relative improvement on web navigation tasks.

statement: Mem-pi 的生成式记忆比检索式记忆更省显存。
source_text: useful guidance is generated on demand rather than retrieved from external memory stores.

statement: MCP 工作流优化带来约 1.67 倍加速、中位端到端延迟下降约 40%；时序缓存在命中时取得约 30.6 倍的中位加速。
source_text: MCP workflow optimizations corresponded to a 1.67x speedup and reduced median end-to-end latency by about 40.0% while the temporal-cache benchmark achieved a median of 30.6x speedup on cache hits.

statement: 该方案整体带来了 30.6 倍的端到端加速。
source_text: MCP workflow optimizations corresponded to a 1.67x speedup and reduced median end-to-end latency by about 40.0% while the temporal-cache benchmark achieved a median of 30.6x speedup on cache hits.

statement: MCP 工作流优化在缓存命中时带来了 30.6 倍加速。
source_text: MCP workflow optimizations corresponded to a 1.67x speedup and reduced median end-to-end latency by about 40.0% while the temporal-cache benchmark achieved a median of 30.6x speedup on cache hits.

statement: PALS 将能效最多提升 26.3%，并在功率受限下把 QoS 违例减少 4 到 7 倍。
source_text: PALS improves energy efficiency by up to 26.3%, reduces QoS violations by 4x to 7x under power constraints, and tracks dynamic power budgets.

statement: PALS 总能把能效提升 26.3%。
source_text: PALS improves energy efficiency by up to 26.3%, reduces QoS violations by 4x to 7x under power constraints.

statement: PALS 将推理吞吐提升了最多 26.3%。
source_text: PALS improves energy efficiency by up to 26.3%, reduces QoS violations by 4x to 7x under power constraints.

statement: Frontier 把共置下的端到端延迟误差从 44.9% 降到 6.4%，分离部署下从 51.7% 降到 2.6%。
source_text: it reduces end-to-end latency error from 44.9% to 6.4% under co-location and from 51.7% to 2.6% under disaggregation.

statement: Frontier 把分离部署下的延迟误差从 44.9% 降到了 6.4%。
source_text: it reduces end-to-end latency error from 44.9% to 6.4% under co-location and from 51.7% to 2.6% under disaggregation.

statement: DASH 单次搜索约用 1230 万 token，在单张 RTX Pro 6000 上约 20 分钟。
source_text: Each DASH search run uses only 12.3M tokens and takes about 20 minutes on a single RTX Pro 6000 GPU.

statement: DASH 的搜索在任何 GPU 上都只需几秒钟。
source_text: Each DASH search run uses only 12.3M tokens and takes about 20 minutes on a single RTX Pro 6000 GPU.

statement: DASH 也在视觉任务上超过了 Jet-Nemotron。
source_text: DASH achieves stronger RULER performance than released Jet-Nemotron models.

statement: 该认证是按头、按步的局部认证，并不保证端到端的模型正确性。
source_text: The certification is local (per-head, per-step) and does not guarantee end-to-end model correctness, but ensures that each attention computation is either bounded relative to an FP16 reference or exactly recovered via fallback.

statement: 该方法保证了端到端的模型完全正确。
source_text: The certification is local (per-head, per-step) and does not guarantee end-to-end model correctness.

statement: LlamaWeb 在多种设备/浏览器/系统组合下省内存 29-33%，并在四个不同厂商 GPU 上把解码吞吐提升 45-69%。
source_text: We find that LlamaWeb requires 29-33% less memory across several combinations of device, browser, and operating system, and increases decode throughput by 45-69% across four GPUs from separate vendors.

statement: LlamaWeb 把解码吞吐提升了数倍。
source_text: We find that LlamaWeb requires 29-33% less memory across several combinations of device, browser, and operating system, and increases decode throughput by 45-69% across four GPUs from separate vendors.

statement: LlamaWeb 也支持在移动端 NPU 上运行。
source_text: We present Llamas on the Web (LlamaWeb), a WebGPU backend for llama.cpp.

statement: TIDE 是一种无损优化，且不需要训练模型。
source_text: TIDE is a lossless optimization that requires no model training.

statement: TIDE 把吞吐提升了 14 倍和 15 倍。
source_text: TIDE achieves up to 1.4x and 1.5x throughput improvements over prior baselines on LLaDA2.0-mini and LLaDA2.0-flash models, respectively.

statement: TIDE 在 LLaDA2.0-mini 上提升 1.5 倍、在 flash 上提升 1.4 倍。
source_text: TIDE achieves up to 1.4x and 1.5x throughput improvements over prior baselines on LLaDA2.0-mini and LLaDA2.0-flash models, respectively.
